help.title: 🤖 Available Commands:
help.messaging_text:
- Just type text → Talk to the agent
- 📎 Send image/file → Forward to agent
- /stop → Stop running agent
- /file → Open file explorer
- /turbo → Toggle turbo planning mode
- /panel → Bring back control panel
help.status_text:
- /latest → Get latest response
- /screenshot → Take IDE screenshot
- /status → System status
- /quota → Check AI quotas
- /version → Show bot version
- /update → Check for bot updates
help.ide_text:
- /start_ide → Start IDE/Agent if closed
- /close → Fully close the app
- /app → Switch between IDE and Agent
- /workspace → Switch project
- /window → Select active window
- /fix_shortcuts → Fix desktop shortcuts
- /lang → Switch language
- /menu → Refresh menu
- /cmd <command> → Run a terminal command
help.chat_text:
- /new → Open a new chat
- /agents → List recent chats
- /artifacts → List artifacts
- /model → Select model to use
- /autoaccept → Toggle auto-accept
- /pushartifacts → Toggle automatic artifact push
- /help → Show this help message

ide.already_running:
✅ Antigravity IDE is already running! No need to open another window.
💡 Use /close to shut it down.
ide.already_closed: ℹ️ IDE is already closed. (Lock file cleaned)
ide.window_close_failed: ❌ Failed to close window. Is there an open window?
ide.closed: ✅ IDE fully closed! (All processes and lock files cleaned)
ide.not_installed:
❌ Antigravity IDE not found. Please install it first.
See: https://antigravity.google/
ide.running_no_cdp:
⚠️ Antigravity IDE is running, but the remote debugging port is not active.

💡 Please close the IDE and run /start_ide again.

ask.empty: Please type a question. Example: `/ask Hello`
ask.done_empty: ✅ Completed but no new text was generated.
ask.timeout: ⚠️ Agent is still thinking or timed out. Use /latest to check.
ask.no_chat_input: No chat input found in the IDE. Please make sure a chat session is open in Antigravity.
ask.focus_success: ✅ Locked onto agent {title}. ✍️ Messages you type now will go directly to this agent.

stop.already_stopped: ℹ️ Agent is already stopped or stop button not found.

model.not_found: ❌ Model not found or could not be selected.
model.select_failed: ❌ Model could not be selected. Make sure the chat screen is open in the IDE.

workspace.cdp_warning: ⚠️ CDP connection may not be ready yet. Wait a few seconds and try again.
workspace.select_prompt: Please select the workspace you want to switch to:
workspace.not_found_standalone: ❌ Project '{wsName}' could not be found or opened in Standalone App.

file.too_large: ❌ File too large ({size}MB). Telegram limit is 50MB.
file.expired: ❌ Session expired, type /file to start again.

menu.updated: ✅ Menu updated! You can see it from the ☰ menu at the bottom left.
menu.ask_desc: Send a question to the agent
menu.agents_desc: List and switch recent chat threads

photo.downloaded: ✅ File downloaded and forwarding to agent...

autoaccept.enabled:
⚡ Auto-Accept ENABLED!

🤖 Observer injected into {injected} targets.
Run, Accept, Allow, and Continue buttons will be auto-clicked.
autoaccept.enabled_none:
⚡ Auto-Accept ENABLED!

⚠️ No targets found yet. Will auto-inject when the agent panel opens.
autoaccept.disabled:
✅ Auto-Accept DISABLED.

📊 Total clicks this session: {clicks}.
autoaccept.status_no_panel: ⚠️ Agent panel not detected. Please open a chat session.

quota.not_found: ❌ Quota information could not be read. It might not be visible in Settings > Customisation.

response_too_long: ⚠️ Response too long. Use /latest to see the full version.

window.not_found: No IDE windows found. Send /start_ide first.
window.title: 🔳 IDE Windows
window.cleared_msg: 🔄 Window preference cleared. Bot will auto-detect the active IDE window.
window.selected_msg: ✅ Now targeting: {{title}} All commands will route to this window.

agents.no_recent: ℹ️ No recent active threads found.

artifacts.no_active_thread: ⚠️ No active thread found. Please select a thread in the IDE first.
artifacts.no_artifacts: ℹ️ No artifacts found for the current thread.

turbo.off:
🛑 Turbo Mode Disabled.
Returned to normal assistant mode.
turbo.on_msg: ⚡ TURBO MODE ACTIVE ⚡ ⚠️ Note: In this mode, your requests will be processed sequentially by Claude and Gemini (Planning -> Coding -> Review). Since codes will be reviewed and edited between agents, more tokens will be consumed. To disable this mode, type /turbo again or click the menu button.
turbo.p1_planning: 🚀 Turbo Mode Started: ⏳ Phase 1: Claude is preparing the plan...
turbo.p1_error: Claude timed out during the planning phase.
turbo.p2_switching: 🚀 Turbo Mode Active: ✅ Phase 1: Claude completed the plan. ⏳ Phase 2: Switching model (Gemini)...
turbo.p2_coding: 🚀 Turbo Mode Active: ✅ Phase 1: Claude completed the plan. ⏳ Phase 2: Gemini is writing the code...
turbo.p2_error: Gemini timed out during the coding phase.
turbo.p3_switching: 🚀 Turbo Mode Active: ✅ Phase 1: Planning ✅ Phase 2: Coding ⏳ Phase 3: Switching model (Claude) - Review...
turbo.p3_reviewing: 🚀 Turbo Mode Active: ✅ Phase 1: Planning ✅ Phase 2: Coding ⏳ Phase 3: Claude is reviewing the code...
turbo.p3_error: Claude timed out during the review phase.
turbo.p4_switching: 🚀 Turbo Mode Active: ✅ Phase 1: Planning ✅ Phase 2: Coding ⚠️ Phase 3: Issues found! ⏳ Phase 4: Switching model (Gemini) - Fixing...
turbo.p4_fixing: 🚀 Turbo Mode Active: ✅ Phase 1: Planning ✅ Phase 2: Coding ⚠️ Phase 3: Issues found! ⏳ Phase 4: Gemini is fixing the issues...
turbo.p4_error: Gemini timed out during the fixing phase.
turbo.done_issues: 🚀 Turbo Mode Completed: ✅ Phase 1: Planning (Claude) ✅ Phase 2: Coding (Gemini) ⚠️ Phase 3: Review (Claude) ✅ Phase 4: Fixing (Gemini) ✨ Results incoming...
turbo.done_no_issues: 🚀 Turbo Mode Completed: ✅ Phase 1: Planning (Claude) ✅ Phase 2: Coding (Gemini) ✅ Phase 3: Review - No Issues (Claude) ✨ Results incoming...

restart.closing: 🔄 Closing Antigravity windows and restarting bot...

standalone.not_installed: ❌ Start failed: Antigravity Standalone does not appear to be installed.
standalone.already_closed: ℹ️ Antigravity Standalone is already closed.
standalone.running_no_cdp:
⚠️ Antigravity Standalone is running, but the remote debugging port is not active.

💡 Please close the agent and run /start_ag again.

close.select_prompt:
⚠️ Please specify which app to close:

👉 Standalone: /close_ag
👉 IDE (Classic): /close_ide

cmd.empty: Please enter a command to run. Example: /cmd ls -la

app.select_prompt: Please select the application you want to control. Both applications can run simultaneously and are controlled via independent ports:

shortcuts.scanning: ⏳ Scanning and updating desktop shortcuts, please wait...
shortcuts.not_found: Not found on desktop or could not be changed
shortcuts.success: ✨ Success! A total of {count} shortcuts updated. The bot will now be able to automatically connect when you launch applications from the desktop.

update.success:
✅ Code updated and dependencies installed.
Bot is restarting now...

voice.empty: Could not understand the audio. Please speak more clearly.

pushartifacts.enabled:
✅ Automatic Artifact Push ENABLED!

New images and videos will be pushed to Telegram as they are created.
